review_summary: Scaffold meets all acceptance criteria: MIT license with correct attribution, README with architecture diagram and pipeline integration guide, pyproject.toml with all required dependencies, Makefile with full target set, Cursor rules adapted for K8s context, directory skeleton covers all 6 build phases.
follow_up: Begin Phase 1: Terraform modules for GKE Autopilot, IAM/Workload Identity, Vertex AI, and namespaces
Write Terraform validation tests before implementation (TDD)
